title: China: Lights Out. Is that Also the Case for Dry Bulk?
section_path: China: Lights Out. Is that Also the Case for Dry Bulk?
section_path_text: China: Lights Out. Is that Also the Case for Dry Bulk?
summary: Without adequate energy supply, life would be massively different. And yet, in our every day lives, a flip of a switch leads to a guaranteed outcome without second thoughts. But what if there was a risk that such an outcome would be trivial?
